image:image.image:title: Data Fight Central Logo — #1 AI Combat Sports Platform
image:image.image:caption: Data Fight Central (DFC) — The world's leading AI-powered combat sports platform. UFC, MMA, Boxing, Muay Thai, BJJ, BKFC. Fighters Are Safer With DFC. Founded 2025, DFC Pty Ltd, Queensland Australia.

image:image.image:title: Data Fight Central App Icon
image:image.image:caption: DFC mobile app icon — AI-powered combat sports analytics, fight news, training tools and fighter safety for UFC, MMA, Boxing and all combat sports.

image:image.image:title: Data Fight Central Maskable Icon
image:image.image:caption: DFC platform icon — Combat sports technology platform with 165+ screens, 80+ services, and AI-powered analytics.

image:image.image:title: Fighters Are Safer With DFC — 12-Pillar Fighter Protection Protocol
image:image.image:caption: Data Fight Central's 12-Pillar Fighter Protection Protocol: Brain Health CTE tracking, Guardian Mode silent SOS, Pink Shield gym certification, Crisis Lifeline, Corner Stop AI, Weight Safety, Mind Body Soul wellness, Financial Shield. No other platform protects fighters like DFC.

image:image.image:title: DFC Event Manager — UFC, MMA & Boxing Fight Events
image:image.image:caption: Data Fight Central event management — fight cards, event posters, promotional materials for UFC, MMA, Boxing, Muay Thai and all combat sports events worldwide.

image:image.image:title: DFC FightWire — Real-Time Combat Sports News
image:image.image:caption: FightWire by Data Fight Central — breaking UFC news, MMA fight results, boxing highlights, Muay Thai events, and combat sports coverage from 40+ global sources.

image:image.image:title: DFC AirCombat — FPV Drone Racing Hub
image:image.image:caption: DFC AirCombat FPV drone racing hub — race events, leaderboards, track maps, FPV video library, technology guides, and pilot profiles. Drone racing by Data Fight Central.

image:image.image:title: DFC Combat Map — Find Gyms & Events Worldwide
image:image.image:caption: Data Fight Central's Global Combat Map — discover boxing gyms, MMA training centers, fight events, and Pink Shield certified DV-safe venues on an interactive map powered by Google Maps.

image:image.image:title: DFC Daily Grind — Combat Sports Training Tools
image:image.image:caption: Daily Grind training tools by Data Fight Central — MMA training plans, boxing drills, Muay Thai pad work, BJJ techniques, fight camp preparation, weight cutting guides, and AI coaching.

image:image.image:title: DFC AI Combat Analytics — Fight Predictions & Stats
image:image.image:caption: AI-powered combat analytics by Data Fight Central — fight predictions, fighter statistics, performance data, opponent analysis, and scouting reports powered by Google Gemini 2.5 Flash AI.

image:image.image:title: DFC Marketplace — Combat Sports Gear & Opportunities
image:image.image:caption: Data Fight Central Marketplace — combat sports gear, MMA equipment, boxing gloves, training gear, fighter jobs, coaching positions, and industry opportunities.
